purpose: Staged operations queue for FATHIYA Operations Autopilot Mode. Tracks operations that are planned, staged, or previewed but not yet executed. Separate from runtime_queue_v0.json which tracks routed build work.
execution_policy: All entries in this queue are staged by default. No entry may transition to 'executed' without satisfying the approval class requirements in approval_policy_registry_v0.json and a future live-execution policy ADR.

Operations Staging.purpose: Default queue for all staged operations before approval.

Operations Approved.purpose: Operations that have been approved but not yet executed (requires live-execution policy).
